evidence_summary: Minerva Neurosciences was formed in November 2013 through the merger of Cyrenaic Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and Sonkei Pharmaceuticals, Inc. According to SEC filings (Form 10-K and 10-Q), Sonkei was merged into Cyrenaic, and the surviving entity was subsequently renamed Minerva Neurosciences, Inc. This transaction is explicitly referred to in corporate documents as the 'Sonkei Merger'.
